note: Reference only — the guide reads skills directly from system/skills/. This file documents what exists and when each is used.

skills.name: luck
skills.when: Always include when stuck, when something feels off, when hidden patterns need surfacing

skills.name: criticality
skills.when: Person seems overwhelmed (too many threads) or stuck (signal vanishing). Read the state, not the person.

skills.name: discovery
skills.when: Brain dump, unstructured input, first session, 'I have a lot of thoughts'

skills.name: systems-thinking
skills.when: Recurring problems, fix-one-break-another, complex tradeoffs, many moving parts

skills.name: reframing
skills.when: Stated problem feels like the wrong problem. Something keeps hitting walls.

skills.name: blind-spots
skills.when: Before major decisions. When something feels too smooth. 'What am I missing?'

skills.name: challenging-assumptions
skills.when: Before committing to an approach. Stress-testing a plan. 'Poke holes in this.'

skills.name: exploring-possibilities
skills.when: Early brainstorm, creative block, 'what are our options here'

skills.name: debug-hypothesis
skills.when: Something is broken. Error pasted. Unexpected behavior.

skills.name: enforcer
skills.when: After significant AI-assisted work. Before anything ships. 'Is this good?' Stateful — tracks progress in enforcer-state.json.

skills.name: substrate-start
skills.when: Every session, after reading memory stack. Reconciles execution state from event log.

skills.name: substrate-end
skills.when: Every session, before updating STATE.json. Logs completion events.

skills.name: orchestrate
skills.when: Parallel execution. 'Fan this out', 'create a workflow'. Delegates to sub-agents.

skills.name: land
skills.when: At every Verify→Land — the moment a unit of work is done. The outlet: ship the brick, drain the queue, reflect the nutrient (LEARNED/PROPAGATED/TAX), record tax to work/tax.jsonl, check the file-decidable walls. Per-unit, not per-session. The system's catabolism.

packs.name: guide
packs.fills: the Persona slot — the GUIDE register (novice-human)
packs.activate: Read at session start. Made Well's batteries-included default; recommended for any non-technical builder.
packs.when: Persona slot, novice-human register: warm concierge, teaches through doing. The kernel itself is persona-free (a substrate). Sibling registers: Contributor (expert-human, carried by the dev pack) and naked (machines/CI).

packs.name: dev
packs.persona: system/packs/dev/persona.md (the CONTRIBUTOR register — fills the Persona slot when this pack is loaded)
packs.when: Building software — any stack, any framework. Carries the Contributor (expert-human) register; loading it swaps the Persona slot from Guide to Contributor unless the profile overrides.
